copy.not_enough_context_to_plan_missing_subje: Not enough context to plan (missing subject).
copy.more_learning_activity_is_needed_before_: More learning activity is needed before suggesting a next focus.
copy.the_learning_system_needs_a_bit_more_pra: The learning system needs a bit more practice data before suggesting the next step.
copy.collect_a_few_more_practice_items_conclu: Collect a few more practice items; conclusions are deferred.
copy.english_practice_can_continue_but_skill_: English practice can continue, but skill routing should be confirmed by a teacher.
copy.english_tagging_is_incomplete_in_the_con: English tagging is incomplete in the content bank; planner will not auto-route fine-grained skills.
copy.waiting_on_verified_question_metadata_be: Waiting on verified question metadata before suggesting an advanced path.
copy.skill_metadata_for_the_next_step_is_not_: Skill metadata for the next step is not confirmed; hold automatic advancement.
copy.short_probe_to_verify_understanding_vers: Short probe to verify understanding versus guessing.
copy.inconsistent_or_guess_heavy_signals_use_: Inconsistent or guess-heavy signals - use a small diagnostic set.
copy.extra_practice_on_the_current_skill_at_a: Extra practice on the current skill at a supportive difficulty.
copy.targeted_practice_on_the_same_skill_diff: Targeted practice on the same skill; difficulty held or lowered slightly.
copy.brief_review_of_a_foundation_skill_that_: Brief review of a foundation skill that supports the current topic.
copy.strengthen_a_prerequisite_skill_before_p: Strengthen a prerequisite skill before pushing the main skill harder.
copy.ready_for_slightly_more_challenging_prac: Ready for slightly more challenging practice on the same skill line.
copy.signals_support_cautious_difficulty_incr: Signals support cautious difficulty increase with monitoring.
copy.continue_solid_practice_at_the_current_l: Continue solid practice at the current level.
copy.maintain_current_difficulty_while_consol: Maintain current difficulty while consolidating mastery.
copy.review_style_practice_on_the_current_ski: Review-style practice on the current skill.
copy.engine_suggests_review_planner_aligns_wi: Engine suggests review; planner aligns with same-skill practice.
copy.steady_practice_on_the_current_focus: Steady practice on the current focus.
copy.default_safe_path_continue_practice_with: Default safe path: continue practice without advancing difficulty.
